/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libobstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libobstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle__description.c.o CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle_array__description.c.o CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/obstacle_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/obstacle_msgs/msg/detail/obstacle_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
